repeat1.interpretation: The deterministic browser topology is exactly one topology emitted by Blender for the same one-pass graph. A separate Blender run differed by 6 vertices and 8 faces, demonstrating native OpenVDB scheduling variability before downstream repeats.

repeat2.interpretation: The second remesh amplifies small schedule-dependent differences in the first surface. The residual is therefore a repeat-chain/OpenVDB determinism boundary; the one-pass surface-net topology table itself is not independently disproven.
